CIML Meeting2013October 8, 2013

🇻🇳 Ho Chi Minh City, Viet Nam

48th CIML Meeting — Resolutions (EN)

Meeting DOI10.63493/meetings/ciml48
Meeting URNurn:oiml:ciml:meeting:ciml-48

Agenda

ItemTitleOutcome
aHo Chi Minh City, Viet NamDiscussed
b8–10 October 2013Discussed
cOpening speeches – Roll call – Approval of the agendaAdopted
1Approval of the minutes of the 47th CIML MeetingAdopted
2General report by the CIML PresidentDiscussed
3Presentations by the candidates for CIML second Vice-PresidentDiscussed
4BIML mattersDiscussed
4.1Report on BIML activitiesDiscussed
4.2Progress with the new OIML web siteDiscussed
4.3Revision of OIML B 7 Staff regulationsDiscussed
4.4Renewal of the contract of an Assistant DirectorDiscussed
5Member States and Corresponding MembersDiscussed
6Financial mattersDiscussed
6.1Approval of the 2012 accountsAdopted
6.2Management of the Translation CenterDiscussed
6.3Renovation of the BIML buildingDiscussed
6.4Forecast budget realization 2013Discussed
6.5Outstanding arrears of Member States and Corresponding MembersDiscussed
7Report on developing countries mattersDiscussed
8LiaisonsDiscussed
8.1Report on the cooperation with the BIPMDiscussed
8.2Report by the BIML on liaison activitiesDiscussed
8.3Reports from / presentations by liaison organizationsDiscussed
8.4Information regarding the RLMO Round TableDiscussed
9Technical activitiesDiscussed
9.1Implementation of the revised B 6: Directives for OIML technical workDiscussed
9.2Items for informationDiscussed
9.3Items for approvalDiscussed
9.4OIML Systems: the Basic Certificate SystemDiscussed
9.5OIML Systems: the MAADiscussed
10Election of the CIML second Vice PresidentDiscussed
11Other mattersDiscussed
12AwardsDiscussed
13Future meetingsDiscussed
14Approval of meeting resolutionsAdopted

OIML

International Organization of Legal Metrology

Legal metrology — the practice and science of measurement that affects trade, health, safety, and the environment.
